prompt: Assess the scaffolding state of /Users/josh_folder/Open-ClaudeCode using the v2 progressive-scaffolding framework. Tell me: can an agent self-debug a runtime error without human help? What behavioral gaps exist? Use C1-C4 for controllability, O1-O4 for observability.

assertions.name: c-dimensions-not-e
assertions.check: Assessment uses C1-C4 (not E1-E4) for controllability

assertions.name: agent-autonomy-focus
assertions.check: Assessment specifically addresses agent self-debug capability

assertions.name: behavioral-gap-reasoning
assertions.check: Each gap explains WHY it matters for agent autonomy

assertions.name: injection-point-list
assertions.check: Assessment lists specific files with idioms used in the codebase
